mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_call_log ( id, biz_type, model_name, user_input, prompt, response_text, final_result, success, error_message, cost_ms, need_review, gmt_create ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{bizType}, #{modelName}, #{userInput}, #{prompt}, #{responseText}, #{finalResult}, #{success}, #{errorMessage}, #{costMs}, #{needReview}, #{gmtCreate} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, biz_type, model_name, user_input, prompt, response_text, final_result, success, error_message, cost_ms, need_review, gmt_create FROM ai_call_log WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT id AS id, user_input AS question, model_name AS modelName, cost_ms AS costMs, need_review AS needReview, gmt_create AS gmtCreate FROM ai_call_log WHERE biz_type = 'RAG_CHAT' AND success = 1 AND need_review = 1 AND model_name = 'SYSTEM_FALLBACK' ORDER BY gmt_create DESC LIMIT #{limit}
